channel.title: Placeholder Text on Lethrell's Profile
channel.description: Recent content in Placeholder Text on Lethrell's Profile

item.title: My Blog
item.description:
This expansion explains why that contradiction matters in practice, details the ethical and operational risks, and gives concrete, prioritized steps leaders can take to restore trust and protect respondents. The goal is to move from a technically misleading promise to a defensible, transparent practice that preserves respondent safety and data integrity.

The Illusion of Anonymity

“After a course, participants are given a survey of 10 questions. To complete the survey, participants open a URL in their web browser, available for a short period, and log in with their organization username and password. The survey prompts for the course name, but not their name. Instead, the survey description on this page indicates that all answers and the survey itself will remain anonymous.”
